prerequisites.note: Re-derived correct positions from .gift ([3,1,0,2,0,3]) match sidecar exactly.

strict_gift.note: Nothing between any stem and '{'. Gold 2-1 stem-# defect (flagged in gold notes, not the bar) is absent here. $CATEGORY scoped CIT/M1/week-1/1.8-flowcharts. Special chars escaped on #### lines (e.g. 'road signs\:'). 6 MCQs, each exactly one '=' + three '~'.

distractor_plausibility.note: All distractors are corpus-grounded beginner misconceptions (diamond-for-any-question, waiting=terminator, upward-arrow=mistake, unlabelled-exits, right-form-wrong-reason). No score-1 absurd options.

beginner_fairness_scope.note: All stems plain-language scenarios. No code syntax, no 1.9+ concepts. Refund-approval (Q6), Excalidraw (Q1), tea/kettle scenarios, IF/OTHERWISE/REPEAT references all taught in this corpus or earlier topics (1.7).

artifacts_dir_hygiene.note: artifacts/ contains only quiz.gift, quiz.meta.json, diagram.mmd, diagram.png, reading.md, reading.meta.json — all sanctioned artifact files; no build scripts or strays.

verdict: Pass — strict GIFT clean (no stem-level feedback), positional bias max_share 0.333, length bias 0.0, absurd_rate 0.0, all 5 LOs covered with no orphans, no out-of-scope questions, artifacts dir clean.
